required_preferences.fact: Prioritizes gentle indoor mobility exercises, such as yoga or stretching, as primary physical activity per doctor’s orders—temporarily avoids outdoor walks until further cardiac evaluation

supersedes.fact: Only walks outside for exercise; avoids indoor gyms entirely

required_preferences.fact: Dedicates Mondays to in-depth business analysis and expense reviews, reallocating routine financial paperwork to shorter sessions throughout the week as needed; now occasionally schedules urgent marketing strategy calls on Mondays if related to cost increases.

supersedes.fact: Blocks Mondays for financial paperwork; never schedules staff meetings or marketing activities that day

required_preferences.fact: Regularly coordinates long-distance soccer tournament transportation logistics with other parents via group chats, handling ridesharing and planning at least two weeks in advance
Requests family and staff assistance for all heavy lifting tasks in the shop; absolutely avoids carrying boxes or supplies himself while under doctor’s restrictions
Shares calendar access and weekly appointment reminders with his wife and sons to coordinate parental care — never allows medical visits to go unscheduled or double-booked.
Regularly price-checks local competitors' menus each month and revises shop pricing when necessary to offset rising fixed costs driven by rent increases.

persona: A small business owner managing payroll for five employees
